title: Add diagram naming, selection interface, clear button, PNG export, fix transform tool, and remove bidirectional arrow

requirements.text: Add diagram naming functionality when saving attack path diagrams in the attack path visualizer, prompting users to input a name for the diagram before saving

quotes: once I save the diagram I should input a name for it

acceptanceCriteria: When the save button is clicked, a dialog or input prompt appears requesting a diagram name
The diagram name is stored with the diagram state when saved to the backend
Users cannot save without providing a name

requirements.text: Implement diagram selection interface in the load functionality to display and choose from multiple saved diagrams by name

quotes: When I load the diagram, I could select the diagrams that was saved

acceptanceCriteria: The LoadDiagramDialog component displays a list of saved diagrams with their names
Users can select a specific diagram from the list to load
The selected diagram's complete state is restored to the canvas

requirements.text: Add a clear button to the attack path visualizer toolbar that removes all elements from the canvas (icons, connections, drawings, text labels)

quotes: Put a clear button for the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: A clear button is visible in the AttackPathToolbar component
Clicking the clear button removes all placed icons, connections, drawings, and text labels from the canvas
The canvas returns to an empty state after clearing

requirements.text: Remove the JPEG export functionality and replace it with PNG export functionality that captures the entire attack path canvas and downloads it as a PNG image file

quotes: Remove the export as JPEG, put a save it as .png file for extraction for my diagram

acceptanceCriteria: The export button in the toolbar triggers PNG export instead of JPEG
The exported PNG file contains all canvas elements including icons, connections, drawings, and text labels
The PNG file is downloaded with an appropriate filename

requirements.text: Fix the free transform tool to properly move and resize both icons and text labels with working transformation controls

quotes: Fix the free transform tool to move icons and text label and modify their sizes

acceptanceCriteria: The free transform tool successfully moves icons when dragged
The free transform tool successfully moves text labels when dragged
The free transform tool resizes icons using transformation handles
The free transform tool resizes text labels using transformation handles
Transformations persist correctly in the canvas state

requirements.text: Remove the bidirectional arrow icon from the attack path visualizer toolbar and prevent it from being placed on the canvas
acceptanceCriteria: The bidirectional arrow icon is not visible in the AttackPathToolbar
Users cannot place bidirectional arrow icons on the canvas
The icon type is removed from the AttackPathIcon component's supported types

requirements.text: Update the backend diagram storage to support diagram names for saved attack path diagrams
acceptanceCriteria: The DiagramState type includes a name field for storing diagram names
The saveDiagramState method accepts and persists diagram names
The backend returns diagram names when retrieving saved diagrams

nonGoals: Adding new icon types to the attack path visualizer
Changing the color scheme or visual styling
